title: Aliens: The Next Step in Human Evolution?

transcript.text: and I'd heard that crane Brinton uh who
was the uh the chairman of the
Department of intellectual history at
Harvard for like 30 years and he was
going to be doing his last lecture and
he said uh I have come to realize that
our human family is right on the brink
of its next step in biological evolution
and the key factor that's going to
differentiate the next species from us
is this evolution of this faculty that
that is able to directly and immediately
experientially access a certain
vibrational frequency uh that exists in
the universe like light or like sound
but that there's an extraordinarily
subtle bonding phenomenon that bonds
every single ultimately irreducible
integer of matter in the entire physical
Universe into one unified harmonic Ho by
means of which we can access this
experience and when when one has this
experience and that you lock into this
unitive phenomena in the universe and it
can download all kinds of information to
you uh nonlinearly like seeing or
hearing
